Home.title: The AI Enterprise Platform
Home.description: Unify ERP, CRM, and autonomous AI Workers on one intelligent platform.

hero.description: Remove the silent tax of growth. Whether you need a single AI worker or a complete enterprise foundation, our engineering team is ready to deploy.

promise.label: The Promise
promise.title: One platform instead of ten tabs.

zeroSilos.title: Zero Silos
zeroSilos.description: Your CRM, HR, finance, and inventory share a single database. No syncing required.

workers.title: Workers That Execute
workers.description: Dedicated AI agents that prospect, write, schedule, and resolve tickets 24/7.

form.title: Book a Demo
form.description: See exactly what the platform and its workforce will do for your operations. Demos take 30 minutes.
form.interest: What do you want to deploy?

hubs.label: Global Presence
hubs.description: Engineering, enterprise support, and customer success teams strategically located across Australia, UAE, and Saudi Arabia.

onboarding.label: Fast Onboarding
onboarding.description: Our streamlined onboarding process gets your business operational in days—not months.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We evaluate your current workflows, identify bottlenecks, and uncover automation opportunities.

design.title: Solution Design + Dev
design.description: Our team architects the perfect combination of AI agents and enterprise modules.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: After approval, we configure, train, and launch your intelligent workspace with ongoing support.

singleWorker.question: Can we start with a single AI worker?
singleWorker.answer: Yes. You can deploy a single AI worker—like the Social Worker or Growth Worker—and add more as you scale. Every module runs on the same shared database, meaning you never have to re-platform.

bilingual.question: Is HIVENOX truly bilingual?
bilingual.answer: Yes. The platform is written and rendered natively in both Arabic and English. It is RTL-aware, understands Gulf dialects, and operates on both Gregorian and Hijri calendars.

raas.question: What is Results-as-a-Service (RaaS)?
raas.answer: With RaaS, we operate the platform for you. Your investment is tied to concrete outcomes—leads generated, tickets resolved, or hours returned—rather than software seats.

compliance.question: Is the platform compliant in my region?
compliance.answer: HIVENOX is VAT/GST-ready and built to handle compliance, tax, and local business regulations across Australia, the United Arab Emirates, and Saudi Arabia.
